title: Unity Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Q4 2024 Results Summary: Revenue: $457 million (reported), with strategic revenue of $442 million, up 4% YoY. Adjusted EBITDA: $106 million, 23% margin, exceeding guidance. Free Cash Flow: $106 million in Q4, up from $61 million in Q4 2023. Full Year 2024 Results: Revenue: $1,813 million (down 4% from 2023). Strategic Revenue: $1,723 million (down 1% YoY). Adjusted EBITDA: $390 million at 21% margins. Free Cash Flow: $286 million (up 29% from 2023). Segment Performance: Create Solutions: Generated strong subscription revenue growth of 15% YoY in Q4, driven by Unity 6 adoption and cancellation of runtime fee. Industry segment achieved 50% revenue growth YoY with major partnerships like Toyota and Raytheon. Grow Solutions: Impacted by customer incentives from legacy IronSource integration and evolving privacy landscape in mobile advertising. Growth Initiatives: Vector platform launched ahead of schedule in Q1 2025 for initial migration with expected 15-20% improvement in installs and in-app purchases. Unity 6: Achieved strong adoption with nearly 38% of active users upgraded by Q4 2024. Forward Guidance for 2025: Q1 2025 revenue guidance of $405-415 million reflecting Vector transition disruption.
